decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducted an adaptive multi-arm, two-stage cluster-randomized trial of HIV self-testing interventions, including interim removal of the lottery arm.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV intervention application of the adaptive multi-arm, multi-stage cluster-randomized design.
supported_label_variants: adaptive multi-arm, multi-stage cluster randomised trial

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used a cluster-randomized trial to compare an outpatient antimicrobial-stewardship intervention with control practices.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete randomized intervention study of antibiotic prescribing for respiratory infections.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducted a phase 3 randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial of motavizumab for preventing RSV disease.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete randomized prevention trial for RSV infection outcomes.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applied a clustered randomized adaptive trial design in a simulation comparing sequential malaria-control strategies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The design was used in a malaria simulation rather than a concrete field intervention or general methodological development of randomized intervention studies.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used a multicentre prospective randomized controlled trial to compare simulation-based and video-based isolation training.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete randomized infection-control training application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducted a parallel cluster-randomized controlled trial of an intervention intended to reduce second-line antibiotic prescribing for urinary tract infections.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete randomized antimicrobial-prescribing intervention study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a Bayesian data-fusion procedure combining pooled and individual samples from adaptive two-phase testing to estimate pathogen prevalence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological-development paper presenting the procedure and implementation guidance.
supported_label_variants: data fusion with two-phased testing of pooled samples

decisions.relationship_evidence: Details bridged treatment comparisons using a cross-study fusion estimator, identification assumptions, and a shared-arm fusion diagnostic.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological source defining and demonstrating bridged treatment comparison by data fusion.
supported_label_variants: fusion approach to compare treatments across studies

decisions.relationship_evidence: Defines a causal estimand for outcomes directly averted by time-varying vaccination and develops an unbiased randomized-trial estimator.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit estimand-and-estimator development for vaccination with indirect effects and rollout over time.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used the parametric g-formula to estimate controlled direct effects and assess whether partner age and number mediate effects of school attendance on HIV and HSV-2.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete causal-mediation application to HIV and HSV-2 outcomes.
named_source_mentions: HIV Prevention Trials Network 068 randomized controlled trial

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used the parametric g-formula to estimate total and controlled direct effects and quantify mediation of transactional-sex effects on HIV incidence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete longitudinal causal-mediation analysis of HIV incidence.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a g-computation approach for causal mediation analysis with sequential multiple ordered mediators and evaluates it using cohort data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological-development source for causal mediation with multiple ordered mediators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used the parametric g-formula to quantify three mediated pathways linking livestock with human African trypanosomiasis risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete pathway-specific causal-mediation application to zoonotic infection risk.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes multiply robust estimators of natural indirect effects with multiple ordered mediators and establishes their theoretical and simulation properties.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological-development source for multiple causal mediation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applied causal mediation analysis and g-formula decomposition to estimate variant-mediated effects of neighborhood income on COVID-19 hospitalization.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete causal-mediation application to SARS-CoV-2 hospitalization.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used four-way decomposition with interventional analogues of natural effects and the g-formula to assess mediation and interaction in vaccination disparities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete mediation analysis of childhood vaccination status.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applied Bayesian Kernel Machine Regression-Causal Mediation Analysis to estimate greenhouse-gas mediation of pollutant effects on infectious encephalitis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete mediation application to infectious-encephalitis incidence and mortality.
supported_label_variants: Bayesian Kernel Machine Regression-Causal Mediation Analysis

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares causal estimators under assumption violations and proposes a prior-outcome augmented instrumental-variable method, heterogeneity statistic, and triangulation framework.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological comparison and framework-development source for observational causal designs.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimated infection- and vaccination-associated sleep-disorder hazards and explicitly cautioned that underreporting of influenza affects interpretation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious risk study with an explicit reporting-bias implication.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used a matched case-control design to identify cholera risk factors and noted possible underreporting of unhygienic behavior and missed mild infections.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete cholera risk-factor study with explicit ascertainment and reporting limitations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combined self-reported AUDIT-C and biomarker-detected alcohol exposure to study mortality and identify underreported alcohol use.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV/HCV risk study explicitly addressing exposure underreporting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared HIV-treatment uptake in sex workers and non-sex workers, using probability matching specifically to reduce underreporting of sex work.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV-care study with an explicit reporting-bias adjustment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combined surveillance and registry data to estimate hepatitis B transmission routes and explicitly identified possible underreporting of risk behaviors.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hepatitis B transmission-risk study with reporting-bias implications.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compared a phosphatidylethanol biomarker with self-report while estimating unhealthy alcohol-use associations and quantified underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV-treatment risk study explicitly assessing exposure underreporting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimated STI incidence before and after PrEP enrollment and adjusted incidence comparisons for changes in testing frequency.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV-prevention intervention study with ascertainment implications from differential testing.
named_source_mentions: Australian Collaboration for Coordinated Enhanced Sentinel Surveillance (ACCESS) clinic network

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimated effects of depression on ART initiation and viral suppression while accounting for time-varying confounding and noting ART underreporting and missing viral-load data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV-treatment risk study with explicit reporting and missing-data implications.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used a population-based case-control study to estimate birth-defect risks after maternal influenza vaccination and explicitly noted bias from vaccination underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccination-safety risk study with explicit exposure-reporting bias.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applied a case-control protocol to estimate infection-control risk factors for SARS-CoV-2 infection among healthcare workers in a context of acknowledged underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete occupational SARS-CoV-2 risk-factor study with reporting implications.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimated determinants of SARS-CoV-2 transmission with a Bayesian model explicitly accounting for superspreading, underreporting, reporting delay, and confounding.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete surveillance-based transmission study addressing reporting biases.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Linked salmonellosis and cancer records to estimate colorectal-cancer risk and explicitly discussed bias from incomplete infection reporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Salmonella risk study with explicit underreporting implications.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Clinically evaluated anti-URG antibodies as early-warning biomarkers for HBV-related cirrhosis and hepatocellular carcinoma, reporting sensitivity and specificity.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses evidence for neutrophil CD64 as an early-warning marker of joint-replacement infection and discusses its reported sensitivity and specificity.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Developed the PRESEP score from prehospital predictors and compared its predictive validity with existing screening and warning scores.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Developed TREWScore from routinely available ICU data to predict septic shock before onset and benchmarked it against existing screening approaches.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development source for a targeted real-time early-warning score.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews developments in early warning and outcome prediction for hepatitis B-associated acute-on-chronic liver failure.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit review intended to synthesize early-warning and prognostic evidence and provide a research outlook.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Prospectively evaluated Early Warning Score trajectories as markers of severity and 28-day prognosis in Gram-negative bacteremia and sepsis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes and evaluates operational use of the computerized PIMIS sepsis protocol and its automatic vital-sign referral pathway.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluated how six suspicion-of-infection definitions affect the measured accuracy of multiple sepsis and early-warning scores.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct diagnostic-performance and robustness assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Narratively reviewed 42 studies evaluating early-warning scores for mortality and ICU admission in emergency and acute medical settings.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Identified and estimated clinical and laboratory predictors of death in severe fever with thrombocytopenia syndrome.
